name: Baked Eggs Florentine
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 oz Can condensed cream of celery soup
20 oz Package frozen chopped spinach, thawed and well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, stir together the soup, carrot, water chestnuts, yogurt, Parmesan cheese, and 1/8 teaspoon pepper.
2. Stir in the thawed, well-drained spinach.
3. Divide the spinach mixture among four individual casserole dishes or into a single 10x6x2-inch baking dish, making indentations with a spoon (or spreading the mixture).
4. Break one egg into each indentation.
5. Bake, covered, in a preheated oven at 350°F for about 45 minutes, or until whites are set and yolks are beginning to set.
6. Sprinkle additional pepper on top, if desired.
Note: Per serving: 210 calories, 13 g protein, 17 g carbohydrates, 10 g fat, 287 mg cholesterol, 798 mg sodium, 853 mg potassium.
